calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73278467 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73278467 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73278467 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data/cases/scotus/73278467 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files -uu data/cases/scotus/73278467 | sort; find . -path '*73278467*' -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/snapshots/2026-07-15.json data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/context.json; sed -n '1,240p' data

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,720p' data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '721,1500p' data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,650p' data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '651,1400p' data/cases/scotus/73278467/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary|salience|CVSG|relist|Tenth|10th|Paid|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120; sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '260,620p' metrics/statpack.md; jq '.scotus_cert_terms? // .terms? // . | keys' metrics/statpack.json | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l metrics/statpack.md; jq '.[0]' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.cert_by_term // .scotus_cert_terms // .terms' metrics/statpack.json | head -160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation 'United States v. Skrmetti, 145 S. Ct. 1816 (2025)' --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const meta = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!meta){text("missing"); exit();} const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"West Virginia v. B.P.J.\" OR \"Little v. Hecox\"",court:["scotus"],filed_after:"2025-11-01",filed_before:"2026-07-15",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","status"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"West Virginia v. B. P. J.",court:["scotus"],filed_after:"2026-06-29",filed_before:"2026-07-01",fields:["id","cluster_id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet","download_url"],num_results:5}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"West Virginia v. B. P. J.",court:["scotus"],filed_after:"2026-06-29",filed_before:"2026-07-01",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","opinions","syllabus"],num_results:2}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11349709,fields:["id","type","plain_text","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Fowler v. Stitt",court:["ca10"],filed_after:"2025-08-01",filed_before:"2026-07-15",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","citation","absolute_url","opinions"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; find data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition -maxdepth 5 -type d -print | sort; git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73278467","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260715T121117Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":1000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260715T121117Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73278467",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260715T121117Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260715T121117Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260715T121117Z/tooling.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260715T121117Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort; git status --short --untracked-files=all -- data/cases/scotus/73278467/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260715T121117Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
